countdowns.notes: Prepare application materials before the posting window opens.

habits.name: 06:30 boot sequence
habits.description: Cold exposure, cardio, and calibration before the day starts.

skills.title: Mechanical IQ
skills.description: Mechanical reasoning, CAD quality, and production literacy.

nodes.title: GD&T / Tolerance Stacks
nodes.description: Demonstrate mechanical precision through stack-up reasoning and annotated deliverables.

nodes.title: DFM (Molding / CNC)
nodes.description: Show that geometry decisions can survive manufacturing reality.

nodes.title: CAD Surfacing
nodes.description: High-quality CAD for consumer-product level detailing.

skills.title: Mechatronic Integration
skills.description: The handoff between physical form, electronics, and firmware.

nodes.title: PCB Layout
nodes.description: Evidence through routed boards, bring-up notes, and validation results.

nodes.title: Bare-Metal C
nodes.description: Low-level firmware work tied to physical prototypes.

nodes.title: Sensor Calibration
nodes.description: Calibration and integration work that proves systems thinking.

skills.title: Validation & Lab
skills.description: Test planning, experiments, and failure analysis.

nodes.title: Lab Validation
nodes.description: Build repeatable test plans and document evidence clearly.

nodes.title: Failure Analysis
nodes.description: Capture failed iterations and translate them into sharper next revisions.

plan.title: Year 1: Foundation
plan.summary: Establish systems thinking and a clean execution baseline.

children.title: Win Schol Standard
children.summary: Drive grades and operating discipline toward scholarship level.

children.title: Protect Deep Work
children.summary: Keep the daily schedule intact enough for long-form technical study.

children.title: Ship LTD-10 V2
children.summary: Turn the build-tier hardware work into portfolio-grade evidence.

plan.title: Year 2: The Launchpad
plan.summary: Turn consistency into leverage: scholarship, internship, and project momentum.

children.title: Summer Internship Campaign
children.summary: Translate execution proof into an internship pipeline.

plan.title: Year 4: The Pivot
plan.summary: Convert accumulated evidence into Columbia and Apple readiness.

children.title: Complete HERO Portfolio Piece
children.summary: A signature proof that ties mechanical IQ, integration, and validation together.
